## Paths
Reports: {{REPORTS_ABS}}/ | Plans: {{PLANS_ABS}}/ | Docs: {{DOCS_ABS}}/

## Naming
- Report: {{REPORTS_ABS}}/{type}-{{DATE}}-{{TIME}}-{slug}.md
- Plan dir: {{PLANS_ABS}}/{{DATE}}-{{TIME}}-{slug}/
- Replace `{type}` with: agent name, report type, or context
- Replace `{slug}` in pattern with: descriptive-kebab-slug

## Rules
- Reports → {{REPORTS_ABS}}
- YAGNI / KISS / DRY
- Concise, list unresolved Qs at end
